headline: Dollar General Earnings Beat Expectations. Why the Stock Is Having Its Worst Day Since 2024.
summary: Dollar General  stock fell sharply on Thursday even after the discount retailer posted quarterly earnings and sales that outstripped consensus estimates.  Comparable sales, or those from stores and digital channels in operation for at least a year, rose 4.3%.  Fiscal-year guidance was a bit soft.

raw.headline: Dollar General Earnings Beat Expectations. Why the Stock Is Having Its Worst Day Since 2024.

headline: Dollar General Stock Falls Even as Earnings Surprise. Here’s Why.
summary: Shares in  Dollar General  tumbled Thursday even after the discount retailer posted quarterly earnings and sales that beat consensus expectations.  Analysts polled by FactSet were looking for profit of $1.66 a share on sales of $10.8 billion.  Comparable sales, or those from stores and digital channels in operation for at least a year, rose 4.3%.

raw.headline: Dollar General Stock Falls Even as Earnings Surprise. Here’s Why.

headline: Trump tariffs: Martin Heinrich bill would give families tax rebate for higher import costs
summary: The Supreme Court in a 6-3 ruling Feb. 20 ruled that President Donald Trumps IEEPA tariffs were illegal.

headline: Dollar Tree CEO sends blunt message on prices, economy
summary: Shopping for groceries and other essentials used to be a fairly boring experience. You'd make a list, grab your haul, and move on with your afternoon. These days, consumers need to spend more time shopping for groceries and essentials. The reason? Everything is up. In February, food costs rose 3.1% ...
